content:
## Why I Started Looking at Nexo

As a developer, I accumulate crypto the same way most people in tech do — through projects, side income, and holding positions I don't want to sell. The problem: crypto sitting in a cold wallet earns zero.

I started looking at Nexo after reading about it on a few finance forums. The promise: earn interest on your crypto, or borrow against it without selling and triggering a taxable event.

After 90+ days of real usage, here's my honest take.

> **📢 Affiliate disclosure:** This article contains an affiliate link to Nexo. If you sign up through my link, I may earn a commission at no cost to you. I only recommend products I've personally used.

![Nexo — Digital Wealth Platform](/images/nexo/nexo-banner-1200x628.png)

## What Is Nexo?

Nexo is a centralized crypto financial platform founded in 2018, based in Zug, Switzerland. Three core products:

1. **Nexo Earn** — Deposit crypto or stablecoins and earn daily interest automatically
2. **Nexo Credit Line** — Borrow cash against your crypto without selling it
3. **Nexo Exchange** — Buy, sell, and swap 60+ cryptocurrencies

As of 2026, Nexo holds over $7 billion in assets across 7+ million users in 200+ countries.

## Getting Started — Account Setup

```
1. Sign up at nexo.com (email + password)
2. Verify identity (KYC — passport or national ID, takes 5–30 min)
3. Enable 2FA immediately
4. Add a withdrawal address to your allowlist
5. Deposit your first asset
```

> **💡** Complete KYC before depositing. Some earn features are gated behind verification.

## Feature 1: Nexo Earn — Daily Passive Yield

You deposit assets, interest accrues daily, compounds automatically. No action needed after the initial deposit.

### Current Earn Rates (rates change — check Nexo for latest)

| Asset | Base Rate | With NEXO token payout |
|---|---|---|
| USDC / USDT | up to 12% APY | up to 14% APY |
| BTC | up to 5% APY | up to 7% APY |
| ETH | up to 5.5% APY | up to 7.5% APY |
| NEXO token | up to 16% APY | — |
| EUR / USD | up to 8% APY | up to 10% APY |

**Payout options:**
- **In-kind** — earn in the same asset you deposit (BTC earns BTC)
- **In NEXO tokens** — +2% APY bonus on top of base rate

### Loyalty Tiers

| Tier | NEXO % of Portfolio | Earn Bonus | Loan Rate |
|---|---|---|---|
| Base | 0–1% | — | 13.9% |
| Silver | 1–5% | +0.25% | 11.9% |
| Gold | 5–10% | +1% | 8.9% |
| Platinum | 10%+ | +2% | 5.9% |

Most users start at Base. Platinum is worth it only if you're already heavily using the platform.

## Feature 2: Nexo Credit Line — Borrow Without Selling

This is the killer feature for long-term holders.

**The scenario:** You hold 1 BTC worth $80,000. You need $20,000 cash. Selling means capital gains tax and losing your position. With Nexo Credit Line:

```
Collateral:    1 BTC ($80,000)
Max LTV:       50%  →  borrow up to $40,000
You borrow:    $20,000 USDC
Interest:      6.9% APY (Platinum) = ~$115/month
BTC position:  stays intact
Tax event:     none
```

### Loan-to-Value Ratios

| Collateral | Max LTV | Maintenance LTV | Liquidation LTV |
|---|---|---|---|
| BTC | 50% | 70% | 83% |
| ETH | 50% | 70% | 83% |
| Stablecoins | 90% | 95% | 100% |

> **⚠️** If collateral value drops and LTV hits the liquidation threshold, Nexo automatically sells your collateral. Keep your LTV below 30% to avoid this during volatile markets.

## Feature 3: Nexo Exchange

Built-in swap for 60+ assets. Convenient for swapping assets already on the platform — but not competitive for large trades where Binance offers tighter spreads.

![Nexo App — Earn up to 16% per year on digital assets](/images/nexo/nexo-product-600x500.png)

## My Results After 90 Days

Real numbers from a $5,000 USDC position at 12% APY:

| Metric | Result |
|---|---|
| Initial deposit | $5,000 USDC |
| APY applied | 12% (Base tier, in-kind) |
| Daily earnings | ~$1.64 / day |
| 90-day total earned | $147.95 USDC |
| Effective APY realized | 11.91% |
| Withdrawals tested | 2 × $500 — both instant |

Numbers track the advertised rate closely. No hidden fees, no rate reductions mid-cycle. I tested partial withdrawals twice — both were in my bank account the next business day via SEPA.

> **💡** Switching to NEXO token payout bumps the rate to 14% APY. On this position, that's an extra ~$16 every 90 days. Small, but it compounds.

## Security — A Developer's Perspective

This is what I checked before depositing real money:

```
✓ TLS 1.3 on all endpoints (verified via SSL Labs)
✓ OAuth2 / JWT session management
✓ Withdrawal address allowlisting — 72-hour lock-in period
✓ 2FA mandatory (TOTP + hardware security key support)
✓ IP allowlisting for API keys
✓ Activity log: IP, device fingerprint, timestamp per action
✓ Proof-of-reserves dashboard — on-chain auditable
```

**Custodial architecture:** BitGo + Ledger Vault as institutional custodians. Multi-signature authorization for fund movements. Majority of assets in offline cold storage (Armanino-audited).

**Regulatory:** VASP licensed in the EU. SOC 2 Type 2 certified. $375M insurance via Lloyd's of London.

**My verdict:** For a centralized custodial platform, Nexo's security posture is solid — comparable to an established neobank. The 72-hour withdrawal lock is the feature I specifically look for: even a compromised session can't immediately drain the account.

The risk I can't fully remove: they hold your private keys. My rule — stablecoins and ETH on Nexo, long-term BTC stays in cold storage.

> **⚠️** Never deposit more than you can afford to have temporarily illiquid. Size your allocation accordingly.

## How to Sign Up

1. Create your account via the link below
2. Complete KYC (5–30 min — have your passport ready)
3. Enable 2FA immediately
4. Set up a withdrawal allowlist address before depositing
5. Deposit — interest starts accruing the same day

Want to see how Nexo stacks up against Binance Earn and cold storage? [Read the full comparison →](/blog/nexo-vs-competitors-2026)

[Open your Nexo account →](https://nexo.sjv.io/c/7446760/918878/12544)
